title: Fix storage.conf overrides in test-system in CI, update c/storage
body: <s>A wild guess at what is happening in #1863 .</s> See below.

comments.body:
> Attempts to fix, apparently long-unused, `make test-integration` and `make test-system` running in containers, for developers’ on-workstation use.

This does fix `make test-integration`. `make test-system` does not work for me — there is no reported error, something about the Podman-in-Podman networking seems to just hang when connecting to the registry container. I didn’t investigate that further.

> @cevich FYI (non-urgent), this points at a part of the reason of the recent Podman trouble - changing storage.conf under a pre-existing Podman database seems to make it unhappy. Now that we don’t do that, that workaround is no longer necessary.

Oh wow, and so you got rid of the "magic" workaround too, fantastic!  Thanks!
